name: /space-report rejects an --aggregate-users flag because solo-scale honest scope forbids multi-user aggregation
command:
mkdir -p space && printf 'metrics: []
' > space/metrics.yaml && printf 'dimensions: {performance: {enabled: true}}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-report.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml --config space/config.yaml --aggregate-users 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'aggregate-users' err.txt && grep -q 'solo-scale' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
